title: Women voters of Nautan demand better primary healthcare and clean water
snippet_text: A coalition of local self-help groups in Nautan has presented a list of demands to major political parties emphasizing sanitational assets.

snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Nautan assembly segment.

snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Nautan. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Nautan assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.
